body.text: The useful way to read AI news is to ask what changes in production: platform control, inference cost, data boundaries, security exposure, labor design, and product leverage.

While Big Tech Pushes AI Agents, Aaron Levie Says Many Executives Still Don't Understand The 'Last Mile' Problem - Benzinga (Benzinga)
Crypto rails power AI agent payments with $73M settled - MEXC (MEXC)
Let AI Write 80% of Its Own Instructions: How to Manage Agents Without Micromanaging - quasa.io (quasa.io)

body.text: The first-order story is rarely enough. A professional reading asks whether the news changes deployment risk, enterprise buying cycles, model economics, developer behavior, or the trust boundary around automation.

body.alt: Image from source article for Agentic AI for Robot Teams
body.caption: Agentic AI for Robot Teams

body.text: The strongest teams will treat AI headlines as prompts for better operating choices, not as reasons to automate before they understand the work.
